sigma_rules.title: CDB Sentinel APEX - FortiGate_CVE202559718_Exploitation_Incident_Response_Findin
sigma_rules.description: Detects activity related to FortiGate CVE-2025-59718 Exploitation: Incident Response Findings
sigma_rules.author: CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0

yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Phantom_in_the_vault_Obsidian_abused_to_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Phantom in the vault: Obsidian abused to deliver PhantomPulse RAT"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-14"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "PhantomPulse" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_Phantom_in_the_vault_Obsidian_abused_to_ {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Phantom in the vault: Obsidian abused to deliver PhantomPulse RAT"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-14"
    strings:
                $kw0 = "PhantomPulse" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_FortiGate_CVE202559718_Exploitation_Inci {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC - Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for FortiGate CVE-2025-59718 Exploitation: Incident Response Findings"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-04-14"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2025-59718" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "FortiGate" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: FortiGate CVE-2025-59718 Exploitation: Incident Response Fin"; content:"CVE-2025-59718"; nocase; sid:3553913; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 2338 threat advisories. Of these, 13 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 96 as HIGH risk. 32 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include multiple unattributed groups. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
